speaker: Argo
text: (Oh... Professor Celio.)

speaker: Argo
text: (……Is he praying? What could he be doing that for I wonder…) *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Oh, we meet again.

speaker: Argo
text: H-Hello.

speaker: Argo
text: Are you praying for something? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: This isn’t praying so much as it is repentance… I suppose. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Repentance...? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Well... Even I have my reasons.

speaker: Argo
text: (...I probably shouldn’t ask…) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: May I ask a question about your lecture from earlier today? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Of course! Please do. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Are you sure it’s okay for me to meet with someone as respected as Lord Scheat? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Why wouldn't it be? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Like, in terms of security...

speaker: Celio
text: Ah... Don’t worry. Dragons are on a level us mortals could never reach. He is by no means a weak creature.

speaker: Celio
text: If a thousand of us took him on at once, not one of us would be able to even touch him. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: His own power is the strongest security he could ask for.

speaker: Argo
text: Dragons are really that strong?

speaker: Celio
text: Yes. They are rumored to be so powerful they could wipe out an entire country if they wanted to.

speaker: Argo
text: What…?

speaker: Celio
text: But they wouldn't do that. Dragons and mortals have a mutually beneficial relationship.

speaker: Argo
text: (Is that really true...?) *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: It’s been said that Lord Scheat can not only see a person's E.P. potential., but also their true nature.

speaker: Celio
text: So he’ll be able to see if anyone with malicious intent gets anywhere near him. He’ll be fine, don’t worry. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text:
It’s more important that you worry about yourself. 
You'll cry during exams if you don’t properly review my lectures. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I will... *

speaker: Argo
text: How big of a wound can your E.P. heal?

speaker: Celio
text: I can heal anything that isn’t fatal. Once you’re dead, there’s nothing I can do.

speaker: Argo
text: What!? Th-That’s amazing!

speaker: Celio
text: Thank you, but I don’t personally find it a very interesting ability for two reasons. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What are they?

speaker: Celio
text: First, unless it is an urgent situation, medical technology can do the same thing.

speaker: Celio
text: My E.P. is, at most, an extension of technology.

speaker: Argo
text: ...But being able to heal in a matter of seconds makes it so much more than that. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Well, it is an ability that’s helpful to the world. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: So...? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: But because of that, I am bound to this island. That is the second reason I don’t find it very interesting. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: "Don't you dare look at me like that." *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: Lord Scheat isn’t the only important person on Craig Island. There are many more who are important in their own right. It’s useful for them to have someone with my ability nearby.

speaker: Celio
text: They have me live here as insurance just in case they get injured. *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: I was given this high position of the knights college president, despite my young age, because of that.

speaker: Argo
text: Oh... I see...

speaker: Celio
text: ...The idea that I’m being kept here as insurance for my superiors is not a very pleasant one.

speaker: Celio
text:
As I said, it’s not an interesting ability. Powerful?
Yes. But not interesting.

speaker: Argo
text: (…Is that so…? Depending on what your ability is capable of, someone could make use of it for themselves…) *

speaker: Celio
text: My apologies, I'm just grumbling to myself. Please pretend you didn’t hear all that. *

speaker: Argo
text: O-Okay...

speaker: Celio
text: Speaking of amazing E.P.s, I’m curious about yours as well.

speaker: Celio
text: “I’ve never seen one like it before… It’s quite unique and strange. It could make something huge happen in the future!” *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-You think so...? I hope you’re right...

speaker: Celio
text: Please have confidence. It was an ability recognized by Lord Scheat himself.

speaker: Argo
text: ...You're right, thank you. *

speaker: Argo
text: Well, if you'll excuse me.

speaker: Celio
text: Okay, Goodbye, Argo. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What would you bring with you if you went to a deserted island? *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: “W-Well that was unexpected... A deserted island...? Hmmm...”

speaker: Celio
text: "For me, it would have to be a book. I imagine being on a deserted island would be quite boring."

speaker: Argo
text: Uh... Not like a survival kit or something?

speaker: Celio
text: But just surviving is difficult, isn't it? I believe that we must have fun even in harsh environments.

speaker: Argo
text: (Is he serious...?)

speaker: Celio
text: Why do you bring it up? Are you planning on going one? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Uh, yeah... Something like that. 🐾

speaker: Celio
text: Oh...? Perhaps it's an omen… *sigh*

speaker: Celio
text: I would love to hear about your experience if you do go to one. I find it very interesting.*

speaker: Argo
text: I just hope I’ll be able to get back safely so I can.

speaker: Celio
text: “I’m sure you’ll be fine. You seem like a hardy person.” *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (He has that kind of image of me, huh...?)
